name: OpenAI Video Generation (Sora)
description: Generate videos from text prompts or images using OpenAI Sora. Supports text-to-video and image-to-video.

skill.name: openai_video
skill.description: Generate videos using OpenAI Sora (text-to-video and image-to-video)
skill.system_prompt:
You have access to OpenAI Sora video generation.

Available tools:
- generate_video: Create a video from a text prompt (text-to-video)
- image_to_video: Create a video from an image + motion prompt (image-to-video)

Tips:
- Use descriptive prompts with camera movements, lighting, and style details
- For image-to-video, the image becomes the first frame
- Available sizes: 1920x1080, 1280x720, 1080x1920 (vertical), 480x480
- Duration: 4, 8, or 12 seconds (default 8)
- Models: sora-2 (fast) or sora-2-pro (high quality)
- Generation takes 1-5 minutes — the tool polls automatically
- Output is saved as MP4 in the work directory

tools.name: generate_video
tools.description: Generate a video from a text prompt using OpenAI Sora. Returns the file path of the saved MP4.

prompt.description: Text description of the video to generate. Be specific about camera movement, lighting, style.

model.description: Model: sora-2 (fast) or sora-2-pro (high quality). Default: sora-2

tools.handler:
#!/bin/bash
set -e

API_KEY="$VAR_OPENAI_API_KEY"
if [ -z "$API_KEY" ]; then
  echo '{"error": "OpenAI API key not configured. Set the openai_api_key variable."}'
  exit 0
fi

PROMPT="$ARG_PROMPT"
SIZE="${ARG_SIZE:-1280x720}"
SECONDS="${ARG_SECONDS:-8}"
MODEL="${ARG_MODEL:-sora-2}"

WORK_DIR="${AT_WORK_DIR:-/tmp}"
OUTPUT="$WORK_DIR/sora-$(python3 -c 'import uuid; print(uuid.uuid4().hex[:12])').mp4"

# Step 1: Create video generation job
CREATE_RESP=$(curl -s -X POST https://api.openai.com/v1/videos \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $API_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d "$(python3 -c "
import json, sys
print(json.dumps({
    'model': '$MODEL',
    'prompt': sys.argv[1],
    'size': '$SIZE',
    'seconds': '$SECONDS'
}))
" "$PROMPT")")

VIDEO_ID=$(echo "$CREATE_RESP" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('id',''))" 2>/dev/null)

if [ -z "$VIDEO_ID" ]; then
  echo "{\"error\": \"Failed to create video job\", \"details\": $(echo "$CREATE_RESP" | python3 -c 'import sys,json; print(json.dumps(sys.stdin.read()))' 2>/dev/null || echo '"unknown"')}"
  exit 0
fi

echo "{\"status\": \"processing\", \"video_id\": \"$VIDEO_ID\"}" >&2

# Step 2: Poll for completion (max 10 minutes)
for i in $(seq 1 60); do
  sleep 10
  STATUS_RESP=$(curl -s https://api.openai.com/v1/videos/$VIDEO_ID \
    -H "Authorization: Bearer $API_KEY")
  
  STATUS=$(echo "$STATUS_RESP" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('status',''))" 2>/dev/null)
  
  if [ "$STATUS" = "completed" ]; then
    break
  elif [ "$STATUS" = "failed" ]; then
    ERROR=$(echo "$STATUS_RESP" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('error',{}).get('message','unknown error'))" 2>/dev/null)
    echo "{\"error\": \"Video generation failed: $ERROR\", \"video_id\": \"$VIDEO_ID\"}"
    exit 0
  fi
done

if [ "$STATUS" != "completed" ]; then
  echo "{\"error\": \"Video generation timed out\", \"video_id\": \"$VIDEO_ID\", \"last_status\": \"$STATUS\"}"
  exit 0
fi

# Step 3: Download the video
HTTP_CODE=$(curl -s -w '%{http_code}' -o "$OUTPUT" \
  "https://api.openai.com/v1/videos/$VIDEO_ID/content?variant=video" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $API_KEY")

if [ "$HTTP_CODE" != "200" ] || [ ! -s "$OUTPUT" ]; then
  echo "{\"error\": \"Failed to download video (HTTP $HTTP_CODE)\", \"video_id\": \"$VIDEO_ID\"}"
  exit 0
fi

# Get duration
DURATION=$(ffprobe -v error -show_entries format=duration -of csv=p=0 "$OUTPUT" 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")
SIZE_BYTES=$(stat -f%z "$OUTPUT" 2>/dev/null || stat -c%s "$OUTPUT" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)

echo "{\"video_file\": \"$OUTPUT\", \"video_id\": \"$VIDEO_ID\", \"duration_seconds\": \"$DURATION\", \"size_bytes\": $SIZE_BYTES, \"model\": \"$MODEL\"}"

tools.name: image_to_video
tools.description: Generate a video from an image (image becomes first frame) using OpenAI Sora. Returns the file path of the saved MP4.

image_path.description: Path to the input image (PNG, JPEG, WebP). This becomes the first frame of the video.

prompt.description: Motion/animation description. What should happen in the video starting from this image.

size.description: Video resolution (must match image dimensions): 1920x1080, 1280x720, 1080x1920, 480x480. Default: auto-detect from image

model.description: Model: sora-2 (fast) or sora-2-pro (high quality). Default: sora-2

tools.handler:
#!/bin/bash
set -e

API_KEY="$VAR_OPENAI_API_KEY"
if [ -z "$API_KEY" ]; then
  echo '{"error": "OpenAI API key not configured. Set the openai_api_key variable."}'
  exit 0
fi

IMAGE_PATH="$ARG_IMAGE_PATH"
PROMPT="$ARG_PROMPT"
SECONDS="${ARG_SECONDS:-8}"
MODEL="${ARG_MODEL:-sora-2}"

if [ ! -f "$IMAGE_PATH" ]; then
  echo "{\"error\": \"Image file not found: $IMAGE_PATH\"}"
  exit 0
fi

# Auto-detect size from image if not specified
if [ -z "$ARG_SIZE" ]; then
  SIZE=$(ffprobe -v error -select_streams v:0 -show_entries stream=width,height -of csv=p=0 "$IMAGE_PATH" 2>/dev/null | tr ',' 'x')
  # Map to nearest supported size
  case "$SIZE" in
    1920x1080|1080x1920|1280x720|480x480) ;;
    *) SIZE="1280x720" ;;
  esac
else
  SIZE="$ARG_SIZE"
fi

WORK_DIR="${AT_WORK_DIR:-/tmp}"
OUTPUT="$WORK_DIR/sora-i2v-$(python3 -c 'import uuid; print(uuid.uuid4().hex[:12])').mp4"

# Step 1: Create video generation job with image input (multipart)
CREATE_RESP=$(curl -s -X POST https://api.openai.com/v1/videos \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $API_KEY" \
  -F "model=$MODEL" \
  -F "prompt=$PROMPT" \
  -F "size=$SIZE" \
  -F "seconds=$SECONDS" \
  -F "input_reference=@$IMAGE_PATH")

VIDEO_ID=$(echo "$CREATE_RESP" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('id',''))" 2>/dev/null)

if [ -z "$VIDEO_ID" ]; then
  echo "{\"error\": \"Failed to create image-to-video job\", \"details\": $(echo "$CREATE_RESP" | python3 -c 'import sys,json; print(json.dumps(sys.stdin.read()))' 2>/dev/null || echo '"unknown"')}"
  exit 0
fi

echo "{\"status\": \"processing\", \"video_id\": \"$VIDEO_ID\"}" >&2

# Step 2: Poll for completion (max 10 minutes)
for i in $(seq 1 60); do
  sleep 10
  STATUS_RESP=$(curl -s https://api.openai.com/v1/videos/$VIDEO_ID \
    -H "Authorization: Bearer $API_KEY")
  
  STATUS=$(echo "$STATUS_RESP" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('status',''))" 2>/dev/null)
  
  if [ "$STATUS" = "completed" ]; then
    break
  elif [ "$STATUS" = "failed" ]; then
    ERROR=$(echo "$STATUS_RESP" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('error',{}).get('message','unknown error'))" 2>/dev/null)
    echo "{\"error\": \"Video generation failed: $ERROR\", \"video_id\": \"$VIDEO_ID\"}"
    exit 0
  fi
done

if [ "$STATUS" != "completed" ]; then
  echo "{\"error\": \"Video generation timed out\", \"video_id\": \"$VIDEO_ID\", \"last_status\": \"$STATUS\"}"
  exit 0
fi

# Step 3: Download the video
HTTP_CODE=$(curl -s -w '%{http_code}' -o "$OUTPUT" \
  "https://api.openai.com/v1/videos/$VIDEO_ID/content?variant=video" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $API_KEY")

if [ "$HTTP_CODE" != "200" ] || [ ! -s "$OUTPUT" ]; then
  echo "{\"error\": \"Failed to download video (HTTP $HTTP_CODE)\", \"video_id\": \"$VIDEO_ID\"}"
  exit 0
fi

DURATION=$(ffprobe -v error -show_entries format=duration -of csv=p=0 "$OUTPUT" 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")
SIZE_BYTES=$(stat -f%z "$OUTPUT" 2>/dev/null || stat -c%s "$OUTPUT" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)

echo "{\"video_file\": \"$OUTPUT\", \"video_id\": \"$VIDEO_ID\", \"duration_seconds\": \"$DURATION\", \"size_bytes\": $SIZE_BYTES, \"model\": \"$MODEL\", \"source_image\": \"$IMAGE_PATH\"}"
